---
title: "results.Rmd"
author: "Leeya Pressburger"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    fig_caption: yes
    number_sections: yes
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Establishing figure

# Source

# Destination

# Airborne fraction
